## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and organization for enterprise AI topics.](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to restructure content into clear themes and clusters for better strategy communication](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Existing content (e.g., industry-specific AI applications) can be leveraged and expanded](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Importance of tagging content by personas, industries, and themes for improved organization](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Airtable structure should be revised to reflect a more strategic approach, similar to the Promfue example](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

## Topics

### Content Clustering and Theme Development

  - [Identified key topic clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [AI reports and studies](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [Listicles (e.g., top AI newsletters, people to follow, conferences)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Enterprise AI guides (by industry, use case, role)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [AI compliance and ethics](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Important concepts (e.g., fine-tuning vs. retraining)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding enterprise-specific AI topics (e.g., explainability, compliance)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Suggestion to curate examples of AI applications and responses](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Existing Content Evaluation

  - [Recognized substantial existing material on industry-specific AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Areas covered: healthcare, finance, construction, gen AI, financial reporting](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand and improve depth of current content](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

### Content Organization and Strategy Communication

  - [Current Airtable structure lacks clear organization and tagging](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Proposed improvement: implement theme and cluster-based structure (as seen in Promfue example)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Benefits of new structure:](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Easier to communicate content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Better visualization of content coverage](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Improved tagging by industry, persona, and theme](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### Airtable Restructuring

  - [Current setup: untagged list of assignments without clear categorization](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Proposed changes:](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Implement themes (broader categories) and clusters (specific topics)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Add descriptions for each cluster (AI-generated initially)](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Tag content by industry, persona, and other relevant attributes](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Goal: Transform from a simple list of assignments to a comprehensive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

## Next Steps

  - Andrej to review and rethink current Airtable structure
  - [Andrej to send Marcel a link to the updated Airtable with assignments by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to communicate the revised content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Consider implementing a tagging system for personas, industries, and themes in the Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Develop descriptions for content clusters to better explain the strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cGFVyyfW8E-LnQrjRfCyLTb__Mevbznd?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
